content: Phase 3: Pivot to FUTURES focus - models (point_value, tick_size, session, contract specs)
Phase 3: P&L calc with point_value for futures, default market=futures
Phase 3: UI - Contract presets (ES, NQ, CL, GC, MES, MNQ...), Session selector, futures-first labels
Phase 3: Dashboard - Best Contract, By Session breakdown, futures-specific KPIs
Phase 3: AI Insights - Futures-specialized coaching prompts (incl. Sessions preset)
Phase 3: Sample CSV (futures), End-to-end verified working
